orbs.title: Physics Fundamentals
orbs.preview: Everything around us follows the laws of physics. ...
orbs.reading: Everything around us follows the laws of physics. Force causes objects to move or stop. Gravity pulls objects toward Earth, while friction slows moving objects. Understanding these forces explains everyday events.
orbs.summary: Everything around us follows the laws of physics. Force causes objects to move or stop. Gravity pulls objects toward Earth, while friction slows moving objects. Understanding these forces explains everyday events.

quiz.question: What force pulls objects toward Earth?

orbs.title: Cellular Biology
orbs.preview: Cells are the smallest units of life. Every living...
orbs.reading: Cells are the smallest units of life. Every living organism is made of one or more cells. Cells contain structures called organelles that perform different jobs. Together they keep organisms alive.
orbs.summary: Cells are the smallest units of life. Every living organism is made of one or more cells. Cells contain structures called organelles that perform different jobs. Together they keep organisms alive.

quiz.question: Cells are the basic unit of:

orbs.title: The Solar System
orbs.preview: The Solar System contains the Sun and eight planet...
orbs.reading: The Solar System contains the Sun and eight planets. Earth is the third planet from the Sun. Gravity keeps planets in orbit around the Sun. Moons orbit planets.
orbs.summary: The Solar System contains the Sun and eight planets. Earth is the third planet from the Sun. Gravity keeps planets in orbit around the Sun. Moons orbit planets.

quiz.question: Earth is the ____ planet from the Sun.
The center of the Solar System is:

orbs.title: States of Matter
orbs.preview: Matter exists as solid, liquid, and gas. Solids ke...
orbs.reading: Matter exists as solid, liquid, and gas. Solids keep their shape, liquids flow, and gases spread to fill space. Heating or cooling changes matter between these states.
orbs.summary: Matter exists as solid, liquid, and gas. Solids keep their shape, liquids flow, and gases spread to fill space. Heating or cooling changes matter between these states.

quiz.question: Which state has a fixed shape?

orbs.title: Photosynthesis
orbs.preview: Plants use sunlight, water, and carbon dioxide to ...
orbs.reading: Plants use sunlight, water, and carbon dioxide to make food. This process is called photosynthesis. Oxygen is released as a byproduct, helping humans and animals breathe.
orbs.summary: Plants use sunlight, water, and carbon dioxide to make food. This process is called photosynthesis. Oxygen is released as a byproduct, helping humans and animals breathe.

orbs.title: Ancient Rome
orbs.preview: Ancient Rome grew from a small city into a powerfu...
orbs.reading: Ancient Rome grew from a small city into a powerful empire. It built roads, aqueducts, and impressive buildings. Roman laws influenced many legal systems today.
orbs.summary: Ancient Rome grew from a small city into a powerful empire. It built roads, aqueducts, and impressive buildings. Roman laws influenced many legal systems today.

orbs.title: World War II
orbs.preview: World War II lasted from 1939 to 1945. It involved...
orbs.reading: World War II lasted from 1939 to 1945. It involved many countries across the world. The war ended with the Allied victory and major global changes.
orbs.summary: World War II lasted from 1939 to 1945. It involved many countries across the world. The war ended with the Allied victory and major global changes.

orbs.title: The Renaissance
orbs.preview: The Renaissance was a period of renewed interest i...
orbs.reading: The Renaissance was a period of renewed interest in art and science. Thinkers encouraged observation and creativity. Many famous artists lived during this time.
orbs.summary: The Renaissance was a period of renewed interest in art and science. Thinkers encouraged observation and creativity. Many famous artists lived during this time.

orbs.title: The Industrial Revolution
orbs.preview: Machines changed how goods were made. Factories in...
orbs.reading: Machines changed how goods were made. Factories increased production and cities grew rapidly. This period transformed work and transportation.
orbs.summary: Machines changed how goods were made. Factories increased production and cities grew rapidly. This period transformed work and transportation.

orbs.title: The Printing Press
orbs.preview: The printing press allowed books to be produced qu...
orbs.reading: The printing press allowed books to be produced quickly. Knowledge spread faster than ever before. More people gained access to education and ideas.
orbs.summary: The printing press allowed books to be produced quickly. Knowledge spread faster than ever before. More people gained access to education and ideas.

orbs.title: Cognitive Biases
orbs.preview: Our brains often use shortcuts when making decisio...
orbs.reading: Our brains often use shortcuts when making decisions. These shortcuts can create biases that affect judgment. Recognizing biases helps improve decision-making.
orbs.summary: Our brains often use shortcuts when making decisions. These shortcuts can create biases that affect judgment. Recognizing biases helps improve decision-making.

orbs.title: Understanding Emotions
orbs.preview: Emotions help us react to situations. Happiness, s...
orbs.reading: Emotions help us react to situations. Happiness, sadness, anger, and fear all serve important purposes. Managing emotions improves relationships.
orbs.summary: Emotions help us react to situations. Happiness, sadness, anger, and fear all serve important purposes. Managing emotions improves relationships.

orbs.title: Memory
orbs.preview: Memory allows us to store and recall information. ...
orbs.reading: Memory allows us to store and recall information. Practice strengthens memory over time. Sleep also plays an important role in remembering.
orbs.summary: Memory allows us to store and recall information. Practice strengthens memory over time. Sleep also plays an important role in remembering.

orbs.title: Motivation
orbs.preview: Motivation is the drive to achieve goals. It can c...
orbs.reading: Motivation is the drive to achieve goals. It can come from internal passion or external rewards. Clear goals make motivation stronger.
orbs.summary: Motivation is the drive to achieve goals. It can come from internal passion or external rewards. Clear goals make motivation stronger.

orbs.title: Habit Formation
orbs.preview: Habits form through repetition. Small actions repe...
orbs.reading: Habits form through repetition. Small actions repeated daily become automatic over time. Good habits lead to lasting improvement.
orbs.summary: Habits form through repetition. Small actions repeated daily become automatic over time. Good habits lead to lasting improvement.

orbs.title: Stoicism
orbs.preview: Focus on what you can control. Accept what you can...
orbs.reading: Focus on what you can control. Accept what you cannot. Calm thinking reduces stress and improves decisions.
orbs.summary: Focus on what you can control. Accept what you cannot. Calm thinking reduces stress and improves decisions.

orbs.title: Existentialism
orbs.preview: People create meaning through choices. Freedom com...
orbs.reading: People create meaning through choices. Freedom comes with responsibility. Actions shape identity.
orbs.summary: People create meaning through choices. Freedom comes with responsibility. Actions shape identity.

orbs.title: Logic
orbs.preview: Logic helps evaluate arguments using evidence inst...
orbs.reading: Logic helps evaluate arguments using evidence instead of emotion. Good reasoning avoids false conclusions.
orbs.summary: Logic helps evaluate arguments using evidence instead of emotion. Good reasoning avoids false conclusions.

orbs.title: Ethics
orbs.preview: Ethics explores right and wrong. Different culture...
orbs.reading: Ethics explores right and wrong. Different cultures have different moral values, but honesty and fairness are widely respected.
orbs.summary: Ethics explores right and wrong. Different cultures have different moral values, but honesty and fairness are widely respected.

orbs.title: Critical Thinking
orbs.preview: Question assumptions, examine evidence, and avoid ...
orbs.reading: Question assumptions, examine evidence, and avoid jumping to conclusions. Strong thinkers stay curious.
orbs.summary: Question assumptions, examine evidence, and avoid jumping to conclusions. Strong thinkers stay curious.

orbs.title: Artificial Intelligence
orbs.preview: AI enables computers to learn from data and perfor...
orbs.reading: AI enables computers to learn from data and perform tasks that usually require human intelligence. It powers voice assistants, recommendations, and self-driving technology. AI improves as it processes more information.
orbs.summary: AI enables computers to learn from data and perform tasks that usually require human intelligence. It powers voice assistants, recommendations, and self-driving technology. AI improves as it processes more information.

orbs.title: The Internet
orbs.preview: The Internet is a global network of computers conn...
orbs.reading: The Internet is a global network of computers connected together. It allows instant communication and sharing of information worldwide. It has transformed how we live and work.
orbs.summary: The Internet is a global network of computers connected together. It allows instant communication and sharing of information worldwide. It has transformed how we live and work.

orbs.title: Cybersecurity
orbs.preview: Cybersecurity protects computers, networks, and da...
orbs.reading: Cybersecurity protects computers, networks, and data from theft or damage. Strong passwords and encryption are key tools. It keeps sensitive information safe.
orbs.summary: Cybersecurity protects computers, networks, and data from theft or damage. Strong passwords and encryption are key tools. It keeps sensitive information safe.

orbs.title: Cloud Computing
orbs.preview: Cloud computing delivers computing services over t...
orbs.reading: Cloud computing delivers computing services over the internet. It allows users to store and access data remotely. This eliminates the need for expensive local hardware.
orbs.summary: Cloud computing delivers computing services over the internet. It allows users to store and access data remotely. This eliminates the need for expensive local hardware.

orbs.title: Programming Basics
orbs.preview: Programming is the process of writing instructions...
orbs.reading: Programming is the process of writing instructions for computers. It uses special languages to solve problems and create software. It requires logical thinking.
orbs.summary: Programming is the process of writing instructions for computers. It uses special languages to solve problems and create software. It requires logical thinking.

orbs.title: Art Movements
orbs.preview: Art styles change over time as artists express new...
orbs.reading: Art styles change over time as artists express new ideas. Movements like Impressionism and Cubism introduced unique techniques. Art reflects history and society.
orbs.summary: Art styles change over time as artists express new ideas. Movements like Impressionism and Cubism introduced unique techniques. Art reflects history and society.

orbs.title: Music History
orbs.preview: Music has evolved over centuries through different...
orbs.reading: Music has evolved over centuries through different cultures. Classical, jazz, and rock each brought new rhythms and instruments. Music connects people universally.
orbs.summary: Music has evolved over centuries through different cultures. Classical, jazz, and rock each brought new rhythms and instruments. Music connects people universally.

orbs.title: Festivals
orbs.preview: Festivals celebrate cultural traditions, religious...
orbs.reading: Festivals celebrate cultural traditions, religious events, or seasons. They often feature special foods, music, and clothing. Festivals strengthen community bonds.
orbs.summary: Festivals celebrate cultural traditions, religious events, or seasons. They often feature special foods, music, and clothing. Festivals strengthen community bonds.

orbs.title: Languages
orbs.preview: Thousands of languages are spoken around the world...
orbs.reading: Thousands of languages are spoken around the world. Language shapes how people think and communicate. Learning a new language opens up new cultures.
orbs.summary: Thousands of languages are spoken around the world. Language shapes how people think and communicate. Learning a new language opens up new cultures.

orbs.title: Food Culture
orbs.preview: Food represents the history and geography of a cul...
orbs.reading: Food represents the history and geography of a culture. Different regions use unique spices and cooking methods. Sharing meals brings people together.
orbs.summary: Food represents the history and geography of a culture. Different regions use unique spices and cooking methods. Sharing meals brings people together.

orbs.title: Communication
orbs.preview: Good communication means listening as well as spea...
orbs.reading: Good communication means listening as well as speaking. Clear messages reduce misunderstandings. Respect and empathy improve conversations.
orbs.summary: Good communication means listening as well as speaking. Clear messages reduce misunderstandings. Respect and empathy improve conversations.

orbs.title: Productivity
orbs.preview: Productivity is about managing time and focus. Bre...
orbs.reading: Productivity is about managing time and focus. Breaking tasks into smaller steps makes them easier to complete. Avoiding distractions helps you work better.
orbs.summary: Productivity is about managing time and focus. Breaking tasks into smaller steps makes them easier to complete. Avoiding distractions helps you work better.

orbs.title: Time Management
orbs.preview: Time management helps prioritize important tasks. ...
orbs.reading: Time management helps prioritize important tasks. Using calendars and lists keeps you organized. It reduces stress and increases efficiency.
orbs.summary: Time management helps prioritize important tasks. Using calendars and lists keeps you organized. It reduces stress and increases efficiency.

orbs.title: Problem Solving
orbs.preview: Problem solving involves identifying an issue and ...
orbs.reading: Problem solving involves identifying an issue and finding a solution. Brainstorming helps generate ideas. Testing solutions leads to success.
orbs.summary: Problem solving involves identifying an issue and finding a solution. Brainstorming helps generate ideas. Testing solutions leads to success.

orbs.title: Decision Making
orbs.preview: Good decisions require evaluating options and cons...
orbs.reading: Good decisions require evaluating options and consequences. Gathering information helps make informed choices. Learning from mistakes improves future decisions.
orbs.summary: Good decisions require evaluating options and consequences. Gathering information helps make informed choices. Learning from mistakes improves future decisions.

orbs.title: Investing Basics
orbs.preview: Investing means putting money into assets that may...
orbs.reading: Investing means putting money into assets that may grow over time. Stocks, bonds, and mutual funds are common investments. Higher returns often come with higher risk.
orbs.summary: Investing means putting money into assets that may grow over time. Stocks, bonds, and mutual funds are common investments. Higher returns often come with higher risk.

orbs.title: Macroeconomics
orbs.preview: Macroeconomics studies the economy as a whole. It ...
orbs.reading: Macroeconomics studies the economy as a whole. It looks at inflation, unemployment, and economic growth. Government policies affect these big economic factors.
orbs.summary: Macroeconomics studies the economy as a whole. It looks at inflation, unemployment, and economic growth. Government policies affect these big economic factors.

orbs.title: Budgeting
orbs.preview: Budgeting is creating a plan for your money. It he...
orbs.reading: Budgeting is creating a plan for your money. It helps balance income and expenses. Sticking to a budget prevents overspending.
orbs.summary: Budgeting is creating a plan for your money. It helps balance income and expenses. Sticking to a budget prevents overspending.

orbs.title: Saving Money
orbs.preview: Saving money builds financial security. Emergency ...
orbs.reading: Saving money builds financial security. Emergency funds protect against unexpected costs. Regular saving leads to long-term wealth.
orbs.summary: Saving money builds financial security. Emergency funds protect against unexpected costs. Regular saving leads to long-term wealth.

orbs.title: Compound Interest
orbs.preview: Compound interest is earning interest on your inte...
orbs.reading: Compound interest is earning interest on your interest. It makes savings grow faster over time. Starting early maximizes its powerful effect.
orbs.summary: Compound interest is earning interest on your interest. It makes savings grow faster over time. Starting early maximizes its powerful effect.
